name: evidence aggregator block decision lists every failing criterion not just the first encountered
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p8","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":2}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'evidence_count=1' err.txt && grep -q 'organizations_count=1' err.txt && grep -q 'tier1_count=0' err.txt && grep -q 'failures=3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
